name: stage-landscape-fit
note: UAT r5 F7 (operator 2026-07-19, landscape screenshot: overlapping controls, sheet running under the next button, tiny icons): the Stage in LANDSCAPE. Contract: transpose leaves the top bar (it lives in the gear sheet as a Key row - rarely touched mid-performance, per the control-zoning coaching); remaining icons are 44px+; the nav becomes a right-edge column and the sheet is padded clear of it so chords NEVER run under the next button; vertical space goes to the music.

steps.label: transpose is OUT of the top bar: pDown/pUp live inside the gear sheet (closed by default), not the always-on tools row
the remaining stage icons are 44px+ (arm's-length legibility, thumb targets)
every top-bar control sits fully inside the viewport (nothing clipped off the right edge)
landscape: the nav column sits in the sheet's cleared padding - chords can never run under the next button
the gear sheet carries the relocated Key row - transpose is one tap away, never lost
snapshot the sheet, then key-down from the new home
transpose still WORKS from the gear sheet (the rendered sheet shifted)
